LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT LIBRADA ZAVALA'S DEMURRER TO THE SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION ALLEGED IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT FILED BY DAR NADIA, INC. IS SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE CROSS-COMPLAINT DOES NOT ALLEGE SUFFICIENT ULTIMATE FACTS TO SUPPORT LIABILITY AGAINST MS. ZAVALA FOR EITHER CONVERSION OR VIOLATION OF SECTION 17200. IF IT CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, DAR NADIA IS GIVEN LEAVE TO CORRECT THIS DEFICIENCY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE; HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/HK

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-29-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Cross-defendant Librada Zavala's demurrer to the second and third causes of action alleged in the cross-complaint filed by Dar Nadia, Inc. is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. The cross-complaint does not allege sufficient ultimate facts to support liability against Ms. Zavala for either conversion or violation of section 17200. If it can do so in good faith, Dar Nadia is given leave to correct this deficiency. Order signed. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

Notice And Motion To Compel Depositions, For Production Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Cary Kletter of Kletter Law, Telephone (650) 577-2336, appearing for plaintiff's Eliseo Dimas Soto et al;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS ELISEO SOTO, LIBRADA ZAVALA'S Motion To Compel Depositions, For Production Documents, And For Sanctions.

Motion is Granted. Defendants shall produce witnesses for deposition and produce documents within 10 days of this order, or on the dates specified in the plaintiffs' amended deposition notices.

Plaintiff's request for sanctions denied. Plaintiff failed to comply with notice requirements of CCP sec. 2023.340. Defense sanctions request denied, as it appears there has been a great deal of difficulty in getting these depositions scheduled, making the present motion at least substantially justified

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Chuck Geerhart; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
